text: France is a country in Western Europe. Its capital is Paris, which is also its largest city.
The dystopian novel '1984' was written by the British author George Orwell and published in 1949.
At standard atmospheric pressure (sea level), pure water boils at 100 degrees Celsius (212 degrees Fahrenheit).
Mars is often called the Red Planet because of the iron oxide (rust) on its surface, which gives it a reddish appearance.
PyTorch is an open-source machine learning library developed by Meta AI. It is primarily used with the Python programming language, though it also has a C++ interface.
